body:
## Requirement

- This is for wallet reconciliation. 
- This is a script for anomaly detection only. 
- This is a read-only reporting script to detect the migration wallet anomalies directly from shard wallet data.

## What It Does

- Scans active wallets from shard storage
- Flags only these two cases:
  - `type = unrelated` with `accountIndex != 0`
  - `type = user` with `accountIndex = 100`
- Outputs a JSON report to `stdout`
- Optionally writes the same JSON report locally via `--out <file>`

## Usage

```bash
npm run wallet-anomaly-report -- --engine mongodb --db-name wdk_data_shard_prod
npm run wallet-anomaly-report -- --engine mongodb --wtype data --rack 1 --out ./tmp/report.json
npm run wallet-anomaly-report -- --engine hyperdb --store ./store/shard-1-data --out ./tmp/report.json
```

## Output

- metadata about the scanned source
- summary counts
- flagged entries with `userId`, `walletId`, `type`, `accountIndex`, `addresses`, and `reasonFlagged`
title: Add one-off wallet anomaly report CLI for migration account-index checks
